g.text: Step 1: Create BgZ Workflow Task at sending party (optional)
input=[FHIR query parameters per BgZ dataset]
Step 2: Locate notification endpoint of receiving party
Step 3: Send Notified Pull task to receiving party
- basedOn = Task/{workflow-task-id} (if workflow task was created)
- input[FHIR queries] = BgZ dataset queries (if no workflow task)
Step 4: Receiving party pulls BgZ Workflow Task
Get access token for sending party
Step 5: Receiving party pulls BgZ dataset
[For each BgZ FHIR query in Task.input]
